name: Illumio
description: Illumio is a Zero Trust Segmentation platform that provides microsegmentation, workload visibility, policy enforcement, and ransomware protection for data centers and cloud environments.

credentialFields.label: PCE URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Illumio PCE base URL including port, e.g. https://pce.example.com:8443. Do not include a trailing slash.

credentialFields.label: Organization ID
credentialFields.helpText: Your Illumio organization ID (typically 1 for single-org deployments). Found in PCE URL paths as /orgs/N.

credentialFields.label: API Key ID
credentialFields.helpText: The API Key ID (username) generated in PCE Settings > API Keys.

credentialFields.label: API Secret
credentialFields.helpText: The API Secret (password) generated alongside the API Key.

checks.name: Workload Visibility
checks.description: Verifies that workloads are managed by Illumio VEN agents and have visibility enabled, ensuring network traffic is being monitored for microsegmentation policy enforcement.

checks.name: Enforcement Mode
checks.description: Checks that workloads are running in full enforcement mode rather than idle or visibility-only, ensuring segmentation policies are actively blocking unauthorized traffic.

checks.name: Segmentation Rulesets
checks.description: Verifies that segmentation rulesets are defined and provisioned in Illumio, confirming that microsegmentation policies exist to control lateral movement between workloads.

checks.name: Label Coverage
checks.description: Checks that workloads have Illumio labels assigned (Role, Application, Environment, Location), essential for policy-driven microsegmentation and proper workload classification.

checks.name: Password Policy
checks.description: Verifies that a strong password policy is configured in the Illumio PCE, checking minimum length and complexity requirements for local user accounts.

checks.name: Events Monitoring
checks.description: Verifies that audit events are being generated in the Illumio PCE, confirming that the events framework is active and security-relevant activities are being logged for compliance.

checks.name: Enforcement Boundaries
checks.description: Checks whether enforcement boundaries are defined in Illumio, providing deny-list based segmentation to block specific traffic flows without requiring full workload enforcement.
